title: Swing Animation
description: Swing Animations is a Fabric mod for Minecraft that overhauls the player’s swing animation.
body:
# SwingAnimations

A Fabric mod that replaces the default Minecraft swing animation with a smoother, more dynamic one.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vVy5fQYcvEY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Features
- Custom swing animation for hand and items
- In-game GUI for easy configuration

## Controls
- **Right Shift** — open settings GUI

## Compatibility
- Fabric
- Minecraft 1.21.4 / 1.21.8
